properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I don't need riches, I don't seek fame All I need is to believe in Your name I don't seek treasures that soon will be gone But You died for me once and I know this is true So with all of my life, I'm living for You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lord, here's my offering It's more than just this song I sing It's my life And when I think upon the day You saved me'cause of grace Oh, Lord, here's my offering

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I lay it down and You raise me up With Your life and peace and hope that won't give up All my tomorrows are safe in Your hands But You died for me once and I know this is true So with all of my life, I'm living for You

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You gave Your everything There at the cross Now this is my life I bring Forever I'm Yours You died for me once and I know this is true So with all of my life, I'm living for You
